Operation 'getApp' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The original summary 'Get App' is too generic and lacks action context. The description is minimal and doesn't explain what information is returned or why an agent would use this operation. The improved version specifies that it retrieves configuration details, clarifies the return type (App object), mentions authentication requirements, and provides domain context about how this operation relates to other SpotSense resources (geofences, beacons, rules). This helps AI agents understand when to call this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a specific application.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete configuration and details for a specific application by its ID. Returns the App object containing application settings, status, and metadata. Requires authentication via API key or bearer token. This operation is useful for verifying application configuration before creating geofences, beacons, or rules.
data.reasoning: The original summary 'Get App' is too generic and lacks action context. The description is minimal and doesn't explain what information is returned or why an agent would use this operation. The improved version specifies that it retrieves configuration details, clarifies the return type (App object), mentions authentication requirements, and provides domain context about how this operation relates to other SpotSense resources (geofences, beacons, rules). This helps AI agents understand when to call this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'createGeofence' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description mentions shape types but lacks critical details about inputs (GeofenceCreate schema), outputs (returned Geofence object), and side effects (immediate activation). Enhanced description clarifies what data is required, what is returned, and the operational state after creation for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Create a new geofence for an application. Supports circular and polygon geofences.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new geofence (circular or polygon) for an application. Accepts a GeofenceCreate object with geographic boundary parameters. Returns the created Geofence object with a unique ID and metadata. The geofence becomes immediately active and available for use in location-triggered rules.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions shape types but lacks critical details about inputs (GeofenceCreate schema), outputs (returned Geofence object), and side effects (immediate activation). Enhanced description clarifies what data is required, what is returned, and the operational state after creation for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'updateGeofence' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal and lacks essential details. Enhanced version clarifies what can be updated (boundaries and properties), what input schema is used, what is returned, and importantly, the side effects (immediate activation and impact on associated rules). This helps AI agents understand the scope and consequences of the update operation.

data.current_description: Update an existing geofence.
data.description_suggestion: Update an existing geofence's geographic boundaries and properties. Accepts a GeofenceCreate object with updated parameters. Returns the modified Geofence object. Changes take effect immediately and affect all active location-triggered rules associated with this geofence.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and lacks essential details. Enhanced version clarifies what can be updated (boundaries and properties), what input schema is used, what is returned, and importantly, the side effects (immediate activation and impact on associated rules). This helps AI agents understand the scope and consequences of the update operation.

message: Operation 'deleteGeofence' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is extremely vague with no context about consequences. Enhanced description clarifies the permanence of deletion, the response format, and critically, the cascading effects on dependent rules. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation and its broader impact on the system state.

data.current_description: Delete a geofence.
data.description_suggestion: Delete a geofence and remove it from the application. Returns a success confirmation. Deletion is permanent and cascades to any location-triggered rules that reference this geofence, which will no longer fire on geofence entry/exit events.
data.reasoning: Original description is extremely vague with no context about consequences. Enhanced description clarifies the permanence of deletion, the response format, and critically, the cascading effects on dependent rules. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation and its broader impact on the system state.

message: Operation 'createRule' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description explains the trigger mechanism well but lacks details about inputs (RuleCreate schema), outputs (returned Rule object), and operational state. Enhanced description clarifies the input schema, what is returned, and that the rule is immediately active. This provides AI agents with complete information about what data is needed, what to expect in response, and the resulting system state.

data.current_description: Create a new location-triggered rule that fires when users enter or exit a geofence or beacon region.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new location-triggered rule that executes actions when users enter or exit geofences or beacon regions. Accepts a RuleCreate object specifying the trigger conditions (geofence/beacon, entry/exit events) and associated actions. Returns the created Rule object with a unique ID. The rule becomes immediately active and begins monitoring location events.
data.reasoning: Original description explains the trigger mechanism well but lacks details about inputs (RuleCreate schema), outputs (returned Rule object), and operational state. Enhanced description clarifies the input schema, what is returned, and that the rule is immediately active. This provides AI agents with complete information about what data is needed, what to expect in response, and the resulting system state.

message: Operation 'getRule' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The current description is too minimal and doesn't explain what information is returned or what constitutes a 'rule' in this domain. Added context about rule components (trigger conditions, actions, status) and clarified the return value to help AI agents understand what data they'll receive.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a specific rule.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete details of a specific location-triggered rule by its ID, including trigger conditions, actions, and current status. Returns the Rule object containing all configuration and metadata.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal and doesn't explain what information is returned or what constitutes a 'rule' in this domain. Added context about rule components (trigger conditions, actions, status) and clarified the return value to help AI agents understand what data they'll receive.

message: Operation 'updateRule' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about what can be updated, whether partial updates are supported, what is returned, and when changes take effect. Added specificity about updateable fields, partial update support, return value, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Update an existing rule.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing location-triggered rule's configuration including trigger conditions, actions, and enabled status. Accepts partial updates via the RuleCreate schema. Returns the updated Rule object. Changes take effect immediately for active applications.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about what can be updated, whether partial updates are supported, what is returned, and when changes take effect. Added specificity about updateable fields, partial update support, return value, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteRule' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is extremely minimal. Added context about permanence, the effect on user interactions, what is returned, and that the action is irreversible to help AI agents understand the consequences of this operation.

data.current_description: Delete a rule.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a location-triggered rule by its ID. Once deleted, the rule will no longer trigger actions for any users. Returns a success confirmation. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: The current description is extremely minimal. Added context about permanence, the effect on user interactions, what is returned, and that the action is irreversible to help AI agents understand the consequences of this operation.

message: Operation 'createBeacon' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too vague about what 'register' means and what inputs/outputs are involved. Added specificity about beacon type (Bluetooth), expected input fields, return value, and activation timing to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's scope and effects.

data.current_description: Register a new beacon region.
data.description_suggestion: Registers a new Bluetooth beacon region for an application. Accepts beacon configuration via the BeaconCreate schema including UUID, major/minor identifiers, and region name. Returns the created Beacon object with assigned ID and metadata. The beacon becomes active immediately.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what 'register' means and what inputs/outputs are involved. Added specificity about beacon type (Bluetooth), expected input fields, return value, and activation timing to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's scope and effects.

message: Operation 'getAnalyticsEvents' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. While the description mentions event types, it doesn't explain the 7 available parameters (filtering options) or that results are paginated. Added details about supported filters, pagination, and use cases to help AI agents understand how to query and interpret the results effectively.

data.current_description: Retrieve location-based analytics events such as geofence entries, exits, and dwell times.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves location-based analytics events for an application, including geofence entries, exits, beacon detections, and dwell times. Supports filtering by date range, event type, user, and location. Returns paginated AnalyticsEvent objects with timestamps, event types, and location details. Useful for analyzing user engagement patterns.
data.reasoning: While the description mentions event types, it doesn't explain the 7 available parameters (filtering options) or that results are paginated. Added details about supported filters, pagination, and use cases to help AI agents understand how to query and interpret the results effectively.
